name: Elemental Transfiguration: Superconduct Blessing
title: Elemental Transfiguration: Superconduct Blessing
desc: The thunder borrows the might of ice, piercing clouds and splitting rocks.
in_play_description:
Roll Phase: Always roll 2 Cryo Dice and 2 Electro Dice.
After you trigger Superconduct reaction(s): Discard this card, then choose either Superconduct Blessing: Deep Freeze or Superconduct Blessing: Electric Surge and add it to your Hand.
